label: head
groundingNote: a part of someone's body; it is above all the other parts of the body; the two {urn:molecule-v0:eye|eyes} [m] are parts of it, the {urn:molecule-v0:mouth|mouth} [m] is part of it; someone thinks because of something inside it
notes: NSM universal molecule. 'Above all other parts' assumes canonical posture; accepted as recognition anchor.
